title: ornithocephalus cascajalensis
intro: Ornithocephalus cascajalensis is a type of orchid plant, specifically a species of terrestrial orchid found in Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits associated with Ornithocephalus cascajalensis include relief from digestive discomfort, reduced inflammation, and improved overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
